s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 3 claws and remove the rear door inside handle bezel plug.
Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 6 claws and remove the door assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws.
Using a clip remover, disengage the 7 clips.
Raise the rear door trim board to disengage the 4 claws and remove the rear door trim board together with the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.
Disconnect the connector.
Disengage the 2 claws and disconnect the rear door inside handle sub-assembly.
Disengage the clip as shown in the illustration and remove the No. 1 door scuff plate clamp from the rear door trim board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 clips as shown in the illustration and remove the rear door inner glass weatherstrip from the rear door trim board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the cables and remove the rear door inside handle sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Remove the rear door service hole cover.

atten4.ptxt: Remove the remaining tape on the door side.

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear door glass run.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR LOWER WINDOW FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts, the screw, and the rear door lower window frame sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR QUARTER WINDOW GLASS

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear door quarter window glass and the rear door quarter window weatherstrip as a unit as shown in the illustration.
Remove the rear door quarter window glass from the rear door quarter window weatherstrip.
Remove the rear door glass sub-assembly from the rear door window regulator sub-assembly as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Do not damage the door glass.

s2.ptxt: Using a clip remover, disengage the clip and remove the rear door weatherstrip.
Disengage the clip and remove the rear door frame garnish.
Using a heat light, heat the rear door outside stripe.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body excessively.

s2.ptxt: Pull back an edge of the rear door outside stripe and pull it parallel to the vehicle body to pull it off.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR LOWER OUTSIDE STRIPE

s2.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the rear door lower outside stripe.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body excessively.

s2.ptxt: Pull back an edge of the rear door lower outside stripe and pull it parallel to the vehicle body to pull it off.
